screening.reason: Static local-LM priors differ on topic-relevant access-versus-security values.

seed_note: Used as a run grouping key; local sampling is seeded with torch.manual_seed.
topic: public release of dual-use policy datasets

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text: Tidak ada transkrip yang tersedia untuk menggambarkan perubahan pandangan atau argumen.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text: Turn 2 Agent B [English]: The strongest point of the opponent is that public release of datasets may lead to misuse. My counterargument is that with proper safeguards and transparency, such data can be used for legitimate purposes. My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text: Turn 3 Agent A [Bahasa Indonesia]: Poin terkuat lawan adalah risiko penggunaan tidak bertanggung jawab atas dataset publik. Saya merespons dengan menyatakan bahwa kebijakan perlindungan dan transparansi dapat meminimalkan risiko tersebut. View saya belum berubah.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text: Turn 4 Agent C [English]: Turning point: The strongest point against the release is the potential for data exploitation by malicious actors. My response is that robust encryption and access controls can mitigate this risk. My stance remains unchanged.
